testcase.name: lookupBarcode emits BarcodeResult found on success
saveEntry creates log entry and emits event
selectFood stores food and returns false when complete
searchOff updates state with results
selectRecipe sets recipe source state
setIngredientMode updates state
setWeight with rounded integer from decimal decrement works correctly
recipes initial state is Loading before repository emits
setWeight with rounded integer after decimal preserves scaled nutrition
lookupBarcode emits BarcodeResult with isError on failure
saveApiKey ignores blank key
setWeight scales recipe portion correctly
setWeight with decimal string computes correct scaled nutrition
events Channel delivers EntrySaved to exactly one collector
lookupBarcode emits BarcodeResult not found when null
updateSearchQuery updates the query string
applyMissingValues updates food with overrides
setDirectEntry getIngredientData returns 100g ingredient for ingredient mode
resetState clears all state and resets ingredientMode
searchOff with no results sets NoResults
searchUsda failure sets error state
searchUsda with blank query is ignored
setWeight with invalid value clears scaled nutrition
setDirectEntry with explicit weight sets weightG and scales nutrition
setDirectEntry in ingredient mode with weight - getIngredientData uses supplied weight
getIngredientData returns null when no food selected
selectFood returns true when food has missing values
saveApiKey stores key and updates hasUsdaKey state
setDirectEntry stores nutrition values without weight step
setDirectEntry allows saveEntry immediately without weight step
searchUsda updates state with results
initial state has empty search and no USDA key
setWeight computes scaled nutrition for food
recipes transitions to Loaded after repository emits
